title: First principles as coordination architecture
summary: Musk's method at SpaceX/Tesla: first-principles decomposition reveals coordination gaps; vertical integration enables designing for coordination; emergent performance compounds into economic advantage that funds more integration.
source: Ch02 — "First principles thinking, applied correctly, reveals coordination opportunities that optimization thinking can never see… designing a new architecture where the parts coordinate to create a superior emergent whole."

nodes.label: Vertical Integration
nodes.description: Owning adjacent layers of the stack

edges.description: Exposes which layers must be coordinated

identifiability_note: Observable via cost trajectories (Falcon 9 launch price, Model S → Model 3 COGS) and market-share data.
